question: B-004-observability-recovery
claim: Add pending-count + oldest-pending-lag + live-failed gauges (+ per-tick pending_after) to the fan-out summary. The timestamped started/completed/failed ledger already exists (settleItem); buildSummary returns only total/succeeded/failed/all_failed — a thin extension.

question: B-004-observability-recovery
claim: On resume, reset/requeue lineages that started without a terminal event (orphaned in-flight). Detection primitives exist (loop-lock isStaleLoopLock+processAlive; fanout-pool started-without-terminal ledger) but NOTHING resets/requeues orphans — reduce-state only carries resumed/restarted, no started-without-terminal sweep.

question: B-004-observability-recovery
claim: A resume that should validate existing JSONL state should REFUSE a missing/empty/corrupt expected state (prove existing state) rather than silently fresh-init. Today status defaults to 'initialized' when absent.

question: B-004-observability-recovery
claim: Periodic progress heartbeat at a configurable cadence during long fan-outs (default ~300s, 0=disable) PLUS a distinct phase=shutdown summary on graceful shutdown. Today loop-lock has only TTL heartbeat (notes 'no long-lived heartbeat process'); fanout-run writes a summary only at terminal completion.

question: B-004-observability-recovery
claim: Surface a bounded failure-class taxonomy (timeout vs exit vs salvage-miss) as low-cardinality labels in the summary. fanout-run already distinguishes timedOut(SIGTERM) vs exitCode + salvage, but fanout-pool collapses to a single failed count. Observability/label slice (NOT the Q3 re-dispatch slice).

question: B-004-observability-recovery
claim: Observability + crash-recovery-reset is a GENUINELY UNCOVERED Deep Loop dimension (roadmap candidates are all scoring/STOP/policy). Highest leverage: orphan-lineage-recovery-reset (H/M, detection present/reset absent) + pool-backlog-gauges (thin PROMOTE on existing ledger). newInfoRatio 0.80.
